title: Chest and Copper Golem Mute
description: This resource pack mutes chest and copper golem sounds.
body:
This resource pack mutes all sounds coming from Copper Golems sorting items, which are:

- Chests opening and closing (also by players)
- Copper Golems walking and moving items

The following sounds are NOT muted:

- Chests being placed and broken
- Copper Golems being spawned, hurt or killed

This resource pack is also available on CurseForge:\
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/chest-and-copper-golem-mute
